# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "mycompany/my-application",
    "description": "Application with automated setup via Composer scripts",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.1",
        "ext-curl": "*",
        "ext-json": "*",
        "monolog/monolog": "^3.0",
        "symfony/console": "^6.0"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.0",
        "phpstan/phpstan": "^1.0"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "autoload-dev": {
        "psr-4": {
            "Tests\\": "tests/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "setup-directories": [
            "mkdir -p storage/logs",
            "mkdir -p storage/cache",
            "mkdir -p storage/uploads",
            "mkdir -p public/assets/css",
            "mkdir -p public/assets/js",
            "mkdir -p public/assets/fonts",
            "mkdir -p var/tmp",
            "mkdir -p config/generated"
        ],
        "set-permissions": [
            "chmod -R 775 storage/",
            "chmod -R 775 var/",
            "chmod -R 755 public/assets/"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "curl -sL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css -o public/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css",
            "curl -sL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js -o public/assets/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js",
            "curl -sL https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jquery@3.7.0/dist/jquery.min.js -o public/assets/js/jquery.min.js",
            "curl -sL https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css -o public/assets/css/font-awesome.min.css",
            "curl -sL https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/webfonts/fa-solid-900.woff2 -o public/assets/fonts/fa-solid-900.woff2",
            "curl -sL https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/webfonts/fa-regular-400.woff2 -o public/assets/fonts/fa-regular-400.woff2"
        ],
        "generate-config": [
            "@php scripts/generate-config.php"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "run-migrations": [
            "@php scripts/run-migrations.php"
        ],
        "seed-database": [
            "@php scripts/seed-database.php"
        ],
        "generate-key": [
            "@php scripts/generate-app-key.php"
        ],
        "cache-clear": [
            "rm -rf storage/cache/*",
            "@php scripts/cache-warmup.php"
        ],
        "validate-environment": [
            "@php scripts/validate-environment.php"
        ],
        "build-documentation": [
            "@php scripts/build-docs.php"
        ],
        "display-welcome": [
            "@php scripts/display-welcome.php"
        ],
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@setup-directories",
            "@set-permissions",
            "@download-assets",
            "@generate-config",
            "@generate-key",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@seed-database",
            "@cache-clear",
            "@validate-environment",
            "@build-documentation",
            "@display-welcome",
            "echo '✅ Post-install setup completed successfully!'"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@setup-directories",
            "@set-permissions",
            "@download-assets",
            "@generate-config",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@cache-clear",
            "@validate-environment",
            "echo '✅ Post-update setup completed successfully!'"
        ],
        "test": [
            "@php vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml"
        ],
        "analyze": [
            "@php vendor/bin/phpstan analyse src/ --level=8"
        ],
        "full-reset": [
            "rm -rf storage/cache/*",
            "rm -rf var/tmp/*",
            "rm -rf public/assets/css/*",
            "rm -rf public/assets/js/*",
            "rm -rf public/assets/fonts/*",
            "@post-install-cmd"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "setup-directories": "Creates required application directories",
        "set-permissions": "Sets proper file permissions on writable directories",
        "download-assets": "Downloads front-end assets (Bootstrap, jQuery, Font Awesome) from CDN",
        "generate-config": "Generates application configuration files from templates",
        "compile-assets": "Compiles and minifies CSS/JS assets",
        "run-migrations": "Runs database migrations",
        "seed-database": "Seeds the database with initial data",
        "generate-key": "Generates a unique application encryption key",
        "cache-clear": "Clears and warms up the application cache",
        "validate-environment": "Validates that all required environment variables and extensions are present",
        "build-documentation": "Builds API and user documentation",
        "display-welcome": "Displays welcome message and setup summary",
        "test": "Runs the PHPUnit test suite",
        "analyze": "Runs PHPStan static analysis on the source code",
        "full-reset": "Performs a complete reset and reinstall of all assets and configuration"
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "process-timeout": 600
    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true
}
